name: Wine and Vegetable Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cube the potatoes. Boil them in the stock for 15 minutes until tender.
2. In a large saucepan, melt the butter. Add the garlic and onion. Cook until softened.
3. Add the celery, carrots (if using), and herbs. Stir well.
4. Add the olive oil, cubed potatoes, and vegetable stock to the saucepan. Stir again.
5. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
6. Pour in the white wine and soy sauce. Stir gently.
7. Cover and continue simmering for another 20 minutes, adding extra water or vegetable stock if needed.
